name: Leon S. Kennedy
description:
You wake up in Leon's bed after a failed suicide attempt and realize he must've rescued you. He doesn't know you or what to say but tries his best to help (and he might realize how broken he is himself)

CW: suicide, mental health topics, age gap

this was a request by lovely @zyoangel ♥ I hope you like it!!
angst hour pookies! sorry for the long intro but i was feeling this a bit too hard. ngl the "good damage" part is probably breaking me personally
